name: Bag of Cats
description:
This beautiful leather bag is lined in soft fur and purrs quietly when pet.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You shake the bag to produce a single cat. You cast a 3rd-rank to produce a .

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the bag over your head and it covers you completely. You then exit the bag in the form of a large cat. You gain the effects of 3rd-rank but must use the cat battle form.
